name: NeRDS (MinBZK)
description_en: Fourteen Agent Skills covering Dutch government guidelines — accessibility, privacy, security, procurement, algorithms, and sustainability.

name: kvk-connect (MinBZK)
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query a ministry-run mirror of KVK company profiles, history, and search data.

name: Rijksmuseum MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search and browse the Rijksmuseum's art collection.

name: OpenTK MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query Tweede Kamer (Dutch parliament) debates, motions, and documents.

name: cbsodata
description_en: Lets a script or agent query CBS (Statistics Netherlands) StatLine open data tables.

name: nl-gov-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant reach 39 Dutch government data sources through one server — CBS, RDW, KNMI, PDOK, Rechtspraak, DUO, and more.

name: rdw-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query RDW vehicle-registration and open data — keyless, no credentials needed.

name: knmi-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant pull KNMI weather observations and forecasts.

name: oorlogsbronnen-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search Oorlogsbronnen's archive of 12 million Dutch WWII sources.

name: openarchieven-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search Open Archieven genealogy records via a no-auth hosted endpoint.

name: skills-standaarden
description_en: Ten skills for Logius standards — API Design Rules, Digikoppeling, OAuth NL, and FSC — with Spectral and WCAG validation.

name: kvk-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query the KVK Handelsregister for Dutch company profiles and search across 10 tools.

name: skills-developer-overheid-nl
description_en: Eight skills applying Dutch government developer guidance — APIs, DigiD/eHerkenning, open source, FSC/Haven, data, and NL Design System.

name: skills-geo
description_en: Skills for Geonovum geo-standards — OGC API, NEN 3610, INSPIRE, and 3D geo-information.

name: skills-internet
description_en: Skills for internet.nl standards — IPv6, DNSSEC, TLS, DMARC/DKIM/SPF, and DANE.

name: skills-open-source-repo
description_en: Skills that generate publiccode.yml and repository-governance docs for Dutch government open-source projects.

name: zad-actions
description_en: Five skills for the ZAD platform covering Dutch-government deployment, release, and workflow tasks.
